plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PatchWork to access your camera to capture photos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow PatchWork to access your microphone (not used).

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow PatchWork to use your location to tag photos with GPS coordinates.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow PatchWork to use your location to tag photos with GPS coordinates.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow PatchWork to use your location to tag photos with GPS coordinates.
